home.title: Pazzo Frontend
home.subtitle: Nuxt 4 + Tailwind 4 + Clean Architecture + DDD baseline
home.description: Starter project with localization, Pinia, and testing ready to scale.

landing.title: Turn every route into a stamped story
landing.subtitle: Pazzo turns your rides into visible progress: collect checkpoint stamps, unlock milestones, and share your growth through a gamified cycling experience.

features.passportBody: Browse curated experiences by adventure type, difficulty, and city. Every passport has clear goals and real rewards.
features.qrBody: Scan, validate, and stamp in seconds with a guided flow optimized for speed outdoors and fraud prevention.
features.mapBody: Locate stations, review zone progress, and plan your next stop with real-time visual context.

steps.one: Pick a passport and set your adventure goal.
steps.two: Scan checkpoints to register verified stamps.
steps.three: Complete challenges, unlock badges, and level up.

footer.description: Platform to create and complete cycling passports through gamified experiences.

product.title: A product built for riders, brands, and cities
product.subtitle: Coordinate routes, checkpoints, and rewards in one digital journey with visible progress.

points.one: Create experiences by season and territory.
points.two: Measure conversion and return rate per passport.
points.three: Activate community with weekly challenges and badges.

catalog.title: Choose your next adventure
catalog.subtitle: Each passport combines checkpoints, difficulty level, and rewards to drive new rides.

coast.title: North Coast 120K
coast.description: Three-stage scenic route with coastal checkpoint stamps and early-completion bonuses.

mountain.title: Mountain Climb
mountain.description: Ascent challenge with viewpoint checkpoints and an exclusive badge for total elevation gain.

urban.title: Urban Circuit
urban.description: Explore iconic city zones, ideal for new riders and branded activations.

passportDetail.title: North Coast 120K
passportDetail.subtitle: Complete 12 verified checkpoints to unlock physical rewards and local ranking.

subtitles.coast: Complete 12 verified checkpoints to unlock physical rewards and local ranking.
subtitles.mountain: High-elevation challenge with timed segments and stamps at demanding viewpoint checkpoints.
subtitles.urban: Urban ride to collect stamps at iconic spots and discover safer community-friendly routes.

createPassport.title: Create Passport
createPassport.subtitle: Define goal, territory, and checkpoints to launch a new experience in minutes.
createPassport.previewBody: Quickly verify structure, difficulty, and rewards before publishing.

map.title: Checkpoint Map
map.subtitle: Visualize real-time status and stamp coverage by area.

stops.three: Linear Park - ideal for new riders

qr.title: QR Stamping Flow
qr.subtitle: Validate checkpoint presence and register stamps with anti-fraud checks.

styleGuide.title: Pazzo Style Guide
styleGuide.subtitle: Visual tokens, typography, and base components to keep product consistency.

logo.title: Pazzo Logo
logo.subtitle: Main symbol version for app surfaces, brand material, and community activations.

prd.title: PRD: Digital Adventure Passport
prd.subtitle: Executive summary of problem, value proposition, and target metrics.

blocks.problemBody: Riders lack an engaging way to track progress and discover routes with meaningful context.
blocks.solutionBody: A digital passport with QR stamping, challenges, and checkpoint map to increase retention.
blocks.metricsBody: Weekly retention, completed passports, stamping frequency, and conversion to physical events.
